message:
fix: close feedback modal on outside click (#9421)

The FeatureRequestModal (Contribute dialog) had closeOnBackdrop={false}
on its BaseModal wrapper, preventing backdrop clicks from closing the
modal. Changed to closeOnBackdrop={true} so clicking outside the modal
triggers the same close flow as ESC/X button, including the unsaved
changes confirmation when the user has typed content.

Fixes #9419

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
